description: Install or update LiquidLogicLabs Utilities module config and help entries.

Migrations & housekeeping — reorganizes flat BMad artifact outputs into structured epic/sprint folder layout (default); migrate-schema upgrades sprint-status.yaml fields; split-status splits sprint-status.yaml into the active/backlog/archived three-file layout; harvest-debt sweeps bmad-defer: code markers into the backlog.
outputs: reorganized artifact directory structure with summary report
